name: Familiar Grounds
description:
All characters in your troupe gain [*Sure Footed*: This character may Joh over Water Features and Wooded Patches and pays 1 less energyu for Traverse actions.] this game. /

extraDescription: If you redice to take the re-roll, all players roll again and you must accept the new result
